title: justicia microthyrsa
intro: Justicia microthyrsa, also known as 'Kadupul', is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Acanthaceae family, native to Sri Lanka and other parts of Asia. It is highly valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which help to alleviate various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues, providing numerous health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Justicia microthyrsa is often used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
